# Pneumonia-Detection
[Pneumonia Detection.ipynb](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25757518/Pneumonia.Detection.ipynb)
{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "08be78e7-7008-4e20-ad6b-d025878149d6",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "#加载必要的库\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import pandas as pd\n",
    "import torch\n",
    "import torch.nn as nn\n",
    "from torchvision import datasets, transforms,models\n",
    "import os \n",
    "from torch.utils.data import DataLoader\n",
    "from torchvision.utils import make_grid\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "3f6c2fcb-9aca-4b72-87a0-fd6a0e226f9e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "#定义一个方法：显示图片\n",
    "def image_show(inp, title=None,save_name=None):\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(12,36)) #设置画布\n",
    "    inp = inp.numpy().transpose((1,2,0)) #张量转数组，调整维度顺序（在pytorch中顺序为channel,height,width;而matploylib中顺序为h,w,c）\n",
    "    mean = np.array([0.485,0.456,0.406]) #定义均值\n",
    "    std = np.array([0.229,0.224,0.225]) #定义标准差\n",
    "    inp = std*inp + mean #还原标准化图片像素值\n",
    "    inp = np.clip(inp,0,1) #裁剪像素值\n",
    "    plt.imshow(inp) #绘制图片到画布\n",
    "    if title is not None:\n",
    "        plt.title(title)\n",
    "    if save_name is not None:\n",
    "        plt.savefig(save_name, bbox_inches='tight', dpi=300)        \n",
    "    plt.show()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "9848c5c9-daf8-4f91-a5a7-4ad6a50dc3c3",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "#更改池化层\n",
    "class AdaptiveConcatPool2d(nn.Module):\n",
    "    def __init__(self,size=None):\n",
    "        super().__init__()\n",
    "        size = size or (1,1) #池化层的卷积核大小，默认为（1，1）\n",
    "        self.pool_one = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d(size) #池化层1：计算区域内的平均值，保留整体信息\n",
    "        self.pool_two = nn.AdaptiveMaxPool2d(size) #池化层2：提取区域内的最大值，保留显著特征\n",
    "\n",
    "    def forward(self,x):\n",
    "        return torch.cat([self.pool_one(x),self.pool_two(x)],1)\n",
    "        "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "9bfbdae6-e966-4547-a503-95cfd5b91b88",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "#迁移学习：在成熟模型的基础上进行微调\n",
    "def get_model():\n",
    "    model_pre = models.resnet50(pretrained=True) #获取预训练模型\n",
    "    #冻结预训练模型中的所有参数\n",
    "    for param in model_pre.parameters():\n",
    "        param.requires_grad = False\n",
    "    #微调模型，替换Resnet最后的两层网络\n",
    "    model_pre.avgpool = AdaptiveConcatPool2d () #池化层替换\n",
    "    model_pre.fc = nn.Sequential( #修改全连接层\n",
    "        nn.Flatten(),#所有维度拉平\n",
    "        nn.BatchNorm1d(4096), #Resnet50中最后一层的输出维度是2048，把两层拼接在一起\n",
    "        nn.Dropout(0.5), #丢掉一些神经元,防止过拟合\n",
    "        nn.Linear(4096,512), #线形层的处理，压缩维度，提取更高级的特征，512可替换\n",
    "        nn.ReLU(), #激活层\n",
    "        nn.BatchNorm1d(512), #标准化处理\n",
    "        nn.Linear(512,2), #输出维度是2\n",
    "        nn.LogSoftmax(dim=1), #损失函数 \n",
    "    )\n",
    "    return model_pre\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "b0fa3087-47f1-428d-a3b6-8b30bc73d19f",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "#定义超参数\n",
    "BATCH_SIZE = 32 #每批处理的数据数量\n",
    "DEVICE = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "e1d4f9d4-f3b9-4cd2-824f-5a978577a6bc",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def main():\n",
    "    #图片转换\n",
    "    data_transforms = {\n",
    "        'train':\n",
    "            transforms.Compose([\n",
    "                transforms.Resize(300), #设置图片大小\n",
    "                transforms.RandomResizedCrop(300), \n",
    "                transforms.RandomHorizontalFlip(), #以50%的概率对图片进行镜像翻转\n",
    "                transforms.CenterCrop(256), #中心裁剪\n",
    "                transforms.ToTensor(), #转换为张量\n",
    "                transforms.Normalize([0.485,0.456,0.406],\n",
    "                                    [0.229,0.224,0.225])\n",
    "            ]),\n",
    "        'val':\n",
    "            transforms.Compose([\n",
    "                transforms.Resize(300),\n",
    "                transforms.CenterCrop(256),\n",
    "                transforms.ToTensor(),\n",
    "                transforms.Normalize([0.485,0.456,0.406],\n",
    "                                    [0.229,0.224,0.225])\n",
    "            ])\n",
    "    }\n",
    "\n",
    "    #操作数据集\n",
    "    #1）数据集路径\n",
    "    data_path = r\"D:\\jupyter_AI\\Pneumonia Detection\\data\\archive\\chest_xray\"\n",
    "    #2)加载数据集train 和 val\n",
    "    image_datasets = { x :datasets.ImageFolder(os.path.join(data_path,x),data_transforms[x])for x in['train','val']}\n",
    "    #3)为数据集创建一个迭代器，读取数据\n",
    "    dataloaders={ x :DataLoader(image_datasets[x],shuffle = True,batch_size = BATCH_SIZE) for x in['train','val']}\n",
    "    #4)训练集和验证集大小（图片数量）\n",
    "    data_sizes= { x :len(image_datasets[x]) for x in['train','val']}\n",
    "    #5)获取标签的类别名称 正常/感染\n",
    "    target_names = image_datasets['train'].classes\n",
    "\n",
    "    #显示一个batch_size的图片（32张图片）\n",
    "    #1）读取32张图片\n",
    "    datas,targets = next(iter(dataloaders['train']))\n",
    "    #2)将若干张图片拼成一幅图像\n",
    "    out = make_grid(datas,nrow=8,padding=8)\n",
    "    #显示图片\n",
    "    image_show(out,title=[target_names[x] for x in targets],save_name = \"x-ray result_image\")\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return dataloaders\n",
    "\n",
    "    \n",
    "    "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "5b914181-ab68-4fe8-b1ed-fc0ee139bcfb",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "C:\\Users\\14592\\AppData\\Roaming\\Python\\Python311\\site-packages\\torchvision\\models\\_utils.py:208: UserWarning: The parameter 'pretrained' is deprecated since 0.13 and may be removed in the future, please use 'weights' instead.\n",
      "  warnings.warn(\n",
      "C:\\Users\\14592\\AppData\\Roaming\\Python\\Python311\\site-packages\\torchvision\\models\\_utils.py:223: UserWarning: Arguments other than a weight enum or `None` for 'weights' are deprecated since 0.13 and may be removed in the future. The current behavior is equivalent to passing `weights=ResNet50_Weights.IMAGENET1K_V1`. You can also use `weights=ResNet50_Weights.DEFAULT` to get the most up-to-date weights.\n",
      "  warnings.warn(msg)\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "#实例化并部署到设备\n",
    "model = get_model().to(DEVICE)\n",
    "#定义损失函数：交叉熵损失函数（适合多分类）\n",
    "criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()\n",
    "#定义优化器\n",
    "optimizer = torch.optim.Adam(filter(lambda p:p.requires_grad,model.parameters()),lr=0.001)\n",
    "    #把最新的参数传给优化器，其他的延用Resnet50的参数"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 15,
   "id": "651c450f-3513-43dd-9676-d99555d98051",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "#定义训练函数\n",
    "def train(model,device,train_loader,criterion,optimizer,epoch,writer):\n",
    "    model.train()\n",
    "    total_loss = 0.0 #总损失值初始化为0\n",
    "    #循环读取数据集，更新模型参数\n",
    "    for batch_id,(data,target) in enumerate(train_loader):\n",
    "        data,target = data.to(device), target.to(device)\n",
    "        optimizer.zero_grad() #梯度初始化为0\n",
    "        output = model(data) #训练后的输出\n",
    "        loss = criterion(output,target) #计算损失\n",
    "        loss.backward() #反向传播\n",
    "        optimizer.step() #更新参数\n",
    "        total_loss += loss.item() #累计训练损失\n",
    "    if writer is not None:\n",
    "        writer.add_scalar(\"Train Loss\",total_loss/len(train_loader),epoch)\n",
    "        writer.flush() #刷新\n",
    "    return total_loss/len(train_loader) #返回平均损失\n",
    "\n",
    "#定义测试函数\n",
    "def test(model,device,test_loader,criterion,epoch,writer):\n",
    "    model.eval() #关掉dropout和batchnorm的随机性\n",
    "    #损失和正确\n",
    "    total_loss = 0.0\n",
    "    correct = 0.0\n",
    "    #循环读取数据\n",
    "    with torch.no_grad():\n",
    "        for data,target in test_loader:\n",
    "            data,target = data.to(device),target.to(device)\n",
    "            #预测输出\n",
    "            output = model(data)\n",
    "            #计算损失\n",
    "            total_loss += criterion(output,target).item()\n",
    "            #判断每张图片是否正常\n",
    "            pred = output.argmax(dim=1)\n",
    "            #累计预测正确的个数\n",
    "            correct += torch.sum(pred == target).item()\n",
    "        \n",
    "        #平均损失\n",
    "        total_loss/len(test_loader)    \n",
    "        #正确率\n",
    "        accuracy = correct/len(test_loader)\n",
    "        #写入日志\n",
    "        if writer is not None:\n",
    "            writer.add_scalar('Test Loss',total_loss,epoch)\n",
    "            writer.add_scalar('Accuracy',test_loss,epoch)\n",
    "            #刷新\n",
    "            writer.flush()\n",
    "        #输出信息\n",
    "        print(\"Test Loss:{:.4f},Accuracy:{:4f}\".format(total_loss,accuracy))\n",
    "        return total_loss,accuracy\n",
    "        \n",
    "\n",
    "        \n",
    "        \n",
    "        "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "34182e5a-932f-4fca-9b12-25f0026bf954",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1200x3600 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "if __name__ == '__main__':\n",
    "    dataloaders = main()\n",
    "    "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 16,
   "id": "f7fdec84-7989-4e35-bc6e-94f342f85679",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Test Loss:0.5393,Accuracy:11.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:0.7664,Accuracy:12.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:1.1601,Accuracy:11.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:0.4991,Accuracy:12.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:0.5271,Accuracy:12.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:0.8804,Accuracy:11.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:0.8583,Accuracy:11.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:1.2137,Accuracy:11.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:0.8416,Accuracy:11.000000\n",
      "Test Loss:1.2813,Accuracy:10.000000\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "#开始训练\n",
    "EPOCHS = 10\n",
    "for epoch in range (1,EPOCHS+1):\n",
    "    train(model,DEVICE,dataloaders['train'],criterion,optimizer,epoch,writer=None)\n",
    "    test(model,DEVICE,dataloaders['val'],criterion,epoch,writer=None)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "3e6a6caa-1852-49f3-b495-4f948a70a204",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": []
  }
 ],

}
